text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I am defeated—what tragedy! Oh, how<n>I draw out
the best in my opponents!<n>To that effect, the race
was a rousing<n>success.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I have also found an adversary<n>whose intensity
surpasses the<n>Golden Generation's, but she
declines me! It seems running by my<n>side is an
honor too high.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, the winds of time billow<n>my sails!
Even without a worthy foe,<n>the crowds roar for
me. They yearn<n>for the bell to toll and mark the
passing of an era!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
So ring it I shall. The Golden<n>Generation awaits at
the Arima Kinen!
